SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.dto

Class ViewData

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.dto.ViewData
public final class ViewData extends Object
Immutable DTO containing rendering data for the current game state. Includes current brick, next brick, hold brick, and ghost piece positions.
Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ViewData(int[][] brickData, int xPosition, int yPosition, int[][] nextBrickData)
    Constructs a ViewData without hold/ghost features (backward compatibility).
    ViewData(int[][] brickData, int xPosition, int yPosition, int ghostYPosition, int[][] nextBrickData, int[][] holdBrickData)
    Constructs a ViewData with all rendering information.

  • Constructor Details

    • ViewData

      public ViewData(int[][] brickData, int xPosition, int yPosition, int ghostYPosition, int[][] nextBrickData, int[][] holdBrickData)
      Constructs a ViewData with all rendering information.
      Parameters:
      brickData - Current brick shape matrix
      xPosition - Current brick x-coordinate
      yPosition - Current brick y-coordinate
      ghostYPosition - Ghost piece y-coordinate (-1 if disabled)
      nextBrickData - Next brick shape matrix
      holdBrickData - Hold brick shape matrix (null if empty)

    • ViewData

      public ViewData(int[][] brickData, int xPosition, int yPosition, int[][] nextBrickData)
      Constructs a ViewData without hold/ghost features (backward compatibility).
      Parameters:
      brickData - Current brick shape matrix
      xPosition - Current brick x-coordinate
      yPosition - Current brick y-coordinate
      nextBrickData - Next brick shape matrix

  • Method Details

    • getBrickData

      public int[][] getBrickData()
      Gets the current brick shape matrix. Returns a defensive copy to prevent external modification.
      Returns:
      Copy of brick shape matrix

    • getXPosition

      public int getXPosition()
      Gets the current brick x-coordinate.
      Returns:
      X-coordinate (column)

    • getYPosition

      public int getYPosition()
      Gets the current brick y-coordinate.
      Returns:
      Y-coordinate (row)

    • getGhostYPosition

      public int getGhostYPosition()
      Gets the ghost piece landing y-coordinate.
      Returns:
      Ghost y-coordinate, or -1 if disabled

    • getNextBrickData

      public int[][] getNextBrickData()
      Gets the next brick shape matrix. Returns a defensive copy to prevent external modification.
      Returns:
      Copy of next brick shape matrix

    • getHoldBrickData

      public int[][] getHoldBrickData()
      Gets the hold brick shape matrix. Returns a defensive copy.
      Returns:
      Copy of hold brick shape matrix, or null if empty

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this ViewData.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String representation

      true if equal, false otherwise

      Returns hash code for this ViewData.
